11.jobstring:
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin_11

#SBATCH --partition=RM-shared
#SBATCH -o lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin_11.out
#SBATCH -e lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin_11.err

set -e
cd $SLURM_SUBMIT_DIR
export PATH=/jet/home/aramamur/bin/Copasi/COPASI-4.34.251-Linux-64bit/bin:$PATH
PYTHON=/jet/home/aramamur/.conda/envs/nephro/bin/python
echo "Job lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin_11 started"
startime=$(date +%s)
$PYTHON hybrid_run.py Arguments_lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin_11.json Run_Info_lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin.json
endtime=$(date +%s)
runtime=$(( $endtime - $startime ))
date -d@$runtime -u +%H:%M:%S > lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin_11.time
echo "Job lifer_5XIHQG_Actinomycin_11 ended"
